items.name: Neuromodulators
items.tagline: Smooth fine lines with a natural finish.
items.description: Soften forehead lines, frown lines, and crow's feet with conservative dosing. Results in a few days; typically maintained with visits every 3–4 months.

items.name: Dermal filler
items.description: Add volume and contour to lips, cheeks, chin, or jawline. We emphasize balance and natural proportion. No overfilling.

items.name: Hydrafacial
items.description: Cleanse, exfoliate, and hydrate in one session. Minimal downtime; ideal for a glow before events or regular maintenance.

items.name: Microneedling
items.description: Improve texture, tone, and the look of acne scars or pores. A series is often recommended; we tailor depth and plan to your skin.

items.name: Laser hair removal
items.description: Long-lasting hair reduction with FDA-cleared devices. Multiple sessions spaced 4–8 weeks apart; we tailor settings to your skin and hair.

items.name: Body contouring
items.description: Non-surgical fat reduction and contouring. Gradual results; we set realistic expectations and recommend a plan at your consultation.
